hf0948f54gbda7g40aegb6dbg007e4c15579c: Githyanki! I must speak with them - a crèche must be near.
hccf2bdb4g3cfbg4e6cg86caga508df66a267: They'll be tough to fight... but not impossible to beat.
hc80742f8g5ee1g4f1fgaeb1g8f72bffec6b5: These gith are formidable - but not infallible. We can take them in battle, should it come to that.
h938c08a1g0a2eg48a1g8f8egaaa8f444f9a1: Let's see if they want to have their blood spilled.
hf092783bg2d62g42eeg91c9g4b0c2caf0adf: Oh - can we kill them? Please? Pretty please?
h784b86efg79f3g4a15g8614ga6a426d50022: Come on, already - we've got a roadblock to clear.
hb8dd91d0gc721g40bfg9ad5g828577cc4559: Those whelps are blocking the bridge. Time to put them in their place.
hf71ba49cg4766g4d4ag840fgdb27e656a2b0: Wonder what yellow flesh tastes like. Let's find out!
haa21ccd7g05bfg4bb5gb12dg0b79bffb37fc: Want me to send them to the Hells? Just say the word.
h2997b25fgf98cg44a6g8034g374a0fd767fb: I reckon those warriors holding the bridge can be fought off... if it comes to that.
hbdef715bg1ecfg44f4gb684gfce60c173916: My kin wield their spears formidably. It would be foolish to provoke battle with them now.
hf4b31541g0157g4538gb918g25334c32f2a0: My kin wield their spears formidably. It would be foolish to provoke battle with them now.
he5389c65g71f8g43b7gad08g36a9068068ae: Facing that lot would be suicide... at least for now.
h38d58598g15c1g4a79gbb64gb3945ba49812: I hate to be negative, but those gith will carve you up like a goose.
heec69445gf6a9g4718g84a1gb147ec306971: Stay clear of those gith. Even the Blade of Frontiers has his limits.
hd7346fb5gb572g46edga1a4g9c2bde706521: Those gith look like a fight and a half. Best keep away from them for now.
hcbef949eg9557g4557gb39cgae697a593965: Hmm. Might need to practice a bit before taking these lads on.
h612d6eb1g875eg4538g9ee6g215c2e56f6c9: With the right troops I could take them... with you, I'm not so sure.
